closeOnEscape.description: Whether to close the drawer when the escape key is pressed.

closeOnInteractOutside.description: Whether to close the drawer when the outside is clicked.

closeThreshold.description: The threshold distance for dismissing the drawer.

defaultOpen.description: The initial open state of the drawer when uncontrolled.

defaultSnapPoint.description: The default snap point of the drawer when uncontrolled.

defaultTriggerValue.description: The default trigger value when uncontrolled.

finalFocusEl.description: Element to receive focus when the drawer is closed.

id.description: The unique identifier of the drawer.

ids.type:
Partial<{
    backdrop: string
    positioner: string
    content: string
    title: string
    description: string
    header: string
    trigger: string | ((value?: string) => string)
    grabber: string
    grabberIndicator: string
    closeTrigger: string
    swipeArea: string
  }>
ids.description: The ids of the elements in the drawer. Useful for composition.

initialFocusEl.description: Element to receive focus when the drawer is opened.

modal.description: Whether the drawer renders as a modal overlay.

open.description: The controlled open state of the drawer.

preventDragOnScroll.description: Whether to prevent dragging on scrollable elements.

preventScroll.description: Whether to prevent scrolling behind the drawer when it's opened.

restoreFocus.description: Whether to restore focus to the element that had focus before the drawer was opened.

snapPoints.description: The snap points of the drawer.

snapToSequentialPoints.description: Whether the drawer should snap to sequential points when swiping.

stack.description: Optional external store for coordinating app-level drawer stack visuals.

swipeDirection.description: The direction in which the drawer can be swiped.

swipeVelocityThreshold.description: The threshold velocity (in pixels/s) for closing the drawer.

trapFocus.description: Whether to trap focus inside the drawer when it's opened.

triggerValue.description: The value of the trigger that currently controls the drawer.

value.description: The drawer machine returned by useDrawer().
